VerificationCode.title: Verification Code
VerificationCode.description: A secure activation code for subscriptions

code.description: The actual string of the code e.g. PTE-XYZ

daysGranted.description: Number of days the code grants

usedBy.description: userId of the user who consumed the code

usedAt.description: Timestamp when the code was used

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the code was created

LeaderboardEntry.title: Leaderboard Entry
LeaderboardEntry.description: A single entry in the global leaderboard

attemptedQuestions.description: List of IDs for questions already scored

Sprint.title: Live Sprint Session
Sprint.description: A Kahoot-style live session hosted by a teacher

SprintResult.title: Sprint Result
SprintResult.description: A single user's result in a sprint

/leaderboard/{userId}.description: Collection of leaderboard entries keyed by userId

/sprints/{sprintId}.description: Collection of active and past sprint sessions

/sprints/{sprintId}/results/{userId}.description: Results for a specific sprint session
